params.context: Batch F-17: naver_cue probe (Phase 1 URL discovery + accessibility check). Naver CUE: 검색 AI integrated into search.naver.com. APF NOT YET REGISTERED. clova/clova_x already registered separately. Try cue.search.naver.com first, then naver search with AI-trigger query.

devtools_check_instructions: 1. Try URLs in order — first reachable wins

4. If accessible: trigger AI response (might appear inline in search results)
